mermaidSyntax:
classDiagram
    class SequenceData {
        +fastq_files: List
        +quality_scores: Array
        +read_length: int
        +trim_adapters()
        +filter_quality()
    }
    class Aligner {
        +reference_genome: str
        +index_path: str
        +align(SequenceData)
        +generate_bam()
    }
    class VariantCaller {
        +min_quality: int
        +min_depth: int
        +call_variants(bam_file)
        +filter_variants()
    }
    class Annotation {
        +database: str
        +version: str
        +annotate_variants(vcf_file)
        +predict_impact()
    }
    class QualityReport {
        +metrics: Dict
        +pass_threshold: float
        +generate_report()
        +visualize()
    }
    
    Aligner ..> SequenceData : uses
    VariantCaller ..> Aligner : consumes BAM
    Annotation ..> VariantCaller : consumes VCF
    QualityReport o-- SequenceData : aggregates
    QualityReport o-- Aligner : aggregates
    QualityReport o-- VariantCaller : aggregates
    QualityReport o-- Annotation : aggregates
